scripts.save-before: cp flakiness-metrics/results-latest.json flakiness-metrics/results-before.json && echo 'Baseline guardado como BEFORE'
scripts.save-after: cp flakiness-metrics/results-latest.json flakiness-metrics/results-after.json  && echo 'Resultados guardados como AFTER'
scripts.workflow:scan: npm run test:all; npm run save-before && npm run analyze:results && echo '--- Revisa las sugerencias y aplica los fixes ---'
scripts.workflow:verify: npm run test:all; npm run save-after  && npm run compare        && echo '--- Verificación completada ---'
scripts.workflow:before: npm run test:flaky; npm run save-before && echo '--- Fase BEFORE completada ---'
scripts.workflow:after: npm run test:stable && npm run save-after && npm run compare && echo '--- Fase AFTER completada ---'
scripts.workflow:full: npm run workflow:before && npm run workflow:after
